reason: Gold oracle (reward=1) fails even before any instruction changes. test_repo_cpp_style_check triggers false failure: check_cpp.sh sets LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 producing 'cannot change locale' in stderr, which matches the 'cannot' critical pattern in the test; also rg (ripgrep) is not installed in the Docker image causing 'xargs: rg: No such file or directory'. These environment issues cause the gold patch to score reward=0. Cannot fix without modifying tests, solution, or environment Dockerfile. Additionally, solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text are test-level issues (tests require specific variable name 'value_as_string' and use text-matching rather than runtime behavior verification).
